text: The Glotz Pawn Shop is a pawn shop operating in the West Alley of Rush Valley. During her pick-pocket days, Paninya would sell her stolen items to the shop to make money. The owner, presumably Glotz, was aware that the goods Paninya brought were stolen, but was not bothered by it. The shop has many expensive items, including a vase worth 800,000 cenz.
